title: MinegotCraft
description: This modpack includes factory building, security systems, everything to start wars with friends, and to help you make better buildings
body:
# ⚙️ MinegotCraft - Create, War, and Automation!
This modpack enhances your engineering, combat, and automation experience by combining Create with advanced technology, warfare, and resource management. Build intricate machines, wage strategic battles, and master automation—all in a single immersive package!

## 🏗️ Engineering & Automation
The Create mod and its addons provide endless possibilities for factory building, mechanical automation, and large-scale construction projects. With ComputerCraft, take your automation even further by coding custom programs to control your machines and logistics!

## ⚔️ Warfare & Strategy
Prepare for battle! This modpack introduces war-focused mechanics, including advanced weaponry, fortifications, and combat systems. Whether defending your base or launching full-scale assaults, you’ll need strategy and firepower to dominate.

## 💎 EMC & Resource Mastery
With EMC mechanics, efficiently manage resources and convert materials effortlessly using transmutation. Say goodbye to tedious grinding and focus on building, fighting, and innovating!

## ✅ Performance & Visual Enhancements
Most OptiFine features are included, along with enhanced animations, and connected textures. Enjoy a visually stunning and optimized gameplay experience without unnecessary lag.

## ✨ Credits
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
